title: PHP Type Juggling — Magic Hash
description: VaultPin checks your PIN by comparing MD5 hashes with PHP's loose-equality `==`. Find a PIN whose md5 collides with the stored hash under that comparison.

hints.text: PHP's `==` treats strings that look like numbers as numbers. Both '0e1234...' and '0e5678...' parse as float 0.0.
Search for `php magic hash list` — the canonical entries include 240610708, QNKCDZO, aabg7XSs, all md5'ing to a '0e...' string of digits.
